nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Capraia
nodes.summary: Capraia是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Corsican finch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Corsican finch
nodes.summary: Corsican finch（Corsican finch，学名 Carduelis corsicana），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 戈爾戈納島

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Corsican finch is found on Corsica and Sardinia as well as the islands of Gorgona, Capraia and Elba in the Tuscan Archipelago. During the breeding season the Corsican finch is found from lowland garrigue up to montane areas where it inhabits dry scrub and conifer forests, mainly of European black pine (Pinus nigra) and maritime pine ([[Pinus pinaster|P
